title: RNAometer
author: Krueger, Ryan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RNAometer is a database of experimentally-determined stabilities for small RNA model systems. The corresponding pairs of secondary structures and free energies (in kcal/mol) are used for nearest neighbor parameter optimization in the preprint titled "Differentiable Folding for Nearest Neighbor Model Optimization."
steps_raw: RNAometer is a database of experimentally-determined stabilities for small RNA model systems. The corresponding pairs of secondary structures and free energies (in kcal/mol) are used for nearest neighbor parameter optimization in the preprint titled "Differentiable Folding for Nearest Neighbor Model Optimization."
